data.title: Microservices Framework
data.description: Netflix employs a microservices architecture, which allows independent development, deployment, and scaling of services.
data.technical_spec: Based on Spring Boot and AWS Cloud for deployment.

data.title: Playback Service
data.description: Handles video streaming to ensure smooth delivery across different devices and network conditions.
data.technical_spec: Built on a combination of NGINX and Netflix's own custom caching solution, including Open Connect.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: Processes data to gain insights and drive recommendations, optimizing user experience.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Apache Kafka and AWS for real-time data processing.

data.title: Global Scalability
data.description: Infrastructure adjusted to serve millions of concurrent users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Deployed across multiple regions with AWS Elastic Load Balancing.

data.title: Chaos Engineering
data.description: Methodology to test system resilience through controlled failure experimentation.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Chaos Monkey and other tools in the Simian Army suite.
